title: Section 22B
content: 1[22B. Term of office of Chairperson and members of Authority.--(1) A person appointed as the Chairperson shall hold office for a term of three years from the date on which he enters upon his office or until he attains the age of sixty-five years, whichever is earlier. (2) A person appointed as a member shall hold office for a term of three years from the date on which he enters upon his office or until he attains the age of sixty-two years, whichever is earlier.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 21, ibid., for section 22 A (w.e.f. 17-11-2006).
